title: wedelia puberula
intro: Wedelia puberula, also known as Small Wedelia or Mexican Biloxi, is a flowering plant species native to Mexico and parts of the southwestern United States. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Wedelia puberula include treating fever, sore throats, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as being used as a natural antiseptic and insect repellent. Herbal preparations of Wedelia puberula can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and it is also used in traditional folk remedies to treat various ailments.
